purpose: Deterministic DB-backed classification matrix for Azure optimization assessments without live Azure calls, AI, or manual interpretation at recommendation runtime.

classificationLevels.meaning: Already optimized or only minor optional improvements remain.
Generally healthy with low-risk optimization opportunities.
Needs review; measurable cost, performance, reliability, security, or governance risk exists.
Action recommended; resource is materially over-costed, underperforming, risky, or non-compliant.
Immediate action recommended; high waste, outage risk, security exposure, or compliance risk.

globalCases.deterministicRecommendation: Fetch Cost Management data before estimating savings.
Add owner and environment tags before automated remediation.
Disable public access or restrict it with private endpoints/access controls.

notes: Collectors should normalize provider-specific fields into signals before classification.
Classification must be deterministic: no natural-language condition parsing is required.
Assessment files provide knowledge and recommendations; this matrix provides executable status thresholds.
